conversation.content: I want to build the game tic tac toe using UIKit in Xcode. I've dragged 9 buttons onto the Main from the library and a reset button. What are my next steps. please give me clear instructions and detailed guidance. Also give me all the code needed to make the game run.
In this step (Create an Outlet Collection (or separate outlets) for the 9 board buttons:) I can't drag the other 8 buttons to the same outlet collection, what should I do?

When using an IBOutlet collection in Xcode, you must connect all buttons to the same collection properly.

Method 1 (Recommended): Connections Inspector
- Create tileButtons from first button
- Select each remaining button
- Open Connections Inspector
- Under Outlet Collections, click + next to tileButtons
- Connect each button

Method 2: Control-drag each button
- Control-drag each button to code
- Select Outlet Collection → tileButtons

If it doesn't work:
- Make sure tileButtons is declared as @IBOutlet var tileButtons: [UIButton]!
- Ensure first connection was an Outlet Collection (not single outlet)
- Check Connections Inspector to verify connections exist
